LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GRO-POWER INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY PLED A VIOLATION OF PROP. 65, AND THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED THE SPECIFIC PRODUCT, GRO-POWER FLOWER 'N' BLOOM 3-12-12, 8.8 LBS., THAT CONTAINS CADMIUM AND CADMIUM COMPOUNDS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc And Gro-Power, Inc
Off Calendar Oct-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PETER SATO OF YEROUSHALMI & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (310)623-1926 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. DORINDA VASSIGH APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT REGARDING THE DIFFERENT NUMBERS APPEARING IN THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND THE CONSENT JUDGMENT REGARDING ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP INC.'s Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc And Gro-Power, Incorporated is Granted. The court finds the civil penalty and the award of attorney fees and costs are reasonable under CA Law. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Beau Richard Burbidge, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel. 415.438.6693, for defendant and moving;
Jason Gianvecchio, Esq. of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 310.623.1926, for plaintiff and opposing party ivia court call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GRO-POWER INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has adequately pled a violation of Prop. 65, and the pleadings are not uncertain. Plaintiff has alleged the specific product, Gro-Power Flower 'n' Bloom 3-12-12, 8.8 lbs., that contains Cadmium and Cadmium Compounds. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
